alternatives.name: Custom cold-drawn, induction-hardened precision profile (ZOLLERN)
alternatives.tradeoffs: IT8 tolerance (+-0.02 mm); in-line IH to 58-64 HRC; near-net-shape reduces grinding stock to <0.3 mm. Weakness: 6-12 week tooling lead for new geometry; EUR 5-15K die NRE; min batch ~100 kg; sole-source dependency. ~25% share.

alternatives.name: Bearing steel round/flat bar stock (in-house machining)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero tooling lead; unlimited geometry flexibility; available from Ovako, Bohler, Sandvik, Carpenter. 40-80% material waste; high machining cost and cycle time; no pre-hardening. Dominant ~60% share.

alternatives.name: Hot-rolled T-section/flat profile + full grinding allowance
alternatives.tradeoffs: +-0.5 mm as-delivered tolerance; lower cost entry; greater grinding stock removal (2-5 mm); higher distortion risk post-harden. ~15% share.

alternatives.name: Pre-hardened ground flat die steel plate (Bohler Calmax, Uddeholm Caldie)
alternatives.tradeoffs: ~3x material cost; no profile geometry option; only works for flat/dovetail slides (OT5); limited grade selection. ~3% niche share.

alternatives.name: Outsourced finished precision-ground rail profile
alternatives.tradeoffs: Highest unit cost; 4-8 week lead time; limited geometry flexibility; no design-in control; delivers Ra <=0.4 um vs ZOLLERN Ra 0.4-1.6 um. ~2% share.
